chapter_title.en: Chapter on a Person Who Assigns Another to Slaughter on Their Behalf and Throws Their Hair in Mecca

text: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ اَلرَّجُلُ يُوصِي مَنْ يَذْبَحُ عَنْهُ وَ يُلْقِي هُوَ شَعْرَهُ بِمَكَّةَ فَقَالَ «لَيْسَ لَهُ أَنْ يُلْقِيَ شَعْرَهُ إِلاَّ بِمِنًى ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3090 - Ibn Muskan narrated from Abu Basir, who said: I said to Abu Abdullah (as): "A man instructs someone to slaughter on his behalf while he discards his hair in Mecca."
Imam (as) replied: "He is not permitted to discard his hair except in Mina."
